author: machdragon
name: XSA + EMA 0.997 + KURE 0.001 + Tanh Reparam
blurb: PR #287 base with Overtone removed; adds light KURE (lambda=0.001) and tanh reparameterization to reduce weight entropy while preserving quality, targeting 16MB-safe artifacts and potential 12L headroom.
notes: Default Modal run uses XSA_LAST_N=4, EMA_DECAY=0.997, KURE_LAMBDA=0.001, R2_LAMBDA=0.0, TANH_REPARAM=1.
